title: The pause on Paramount’s $110 billion WBD deal has been extended for another fortnight.
summary: US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín issued a decision Thursday extending her temporary restraining order to a total of 28 days, report The Wrap and Variety . Disclosure: The Verge ’s editorial staff is also unionized with the Writers Guild of America, East.
